forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KQ367HE0Z8ZSXY90CTT8QYGG
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: fe80
+project: acp-upgrade
+title: 'ACP 0.11: extras: TracingAgent + lib.rs/hook_config foundation'
+---
+## What
+
+Migrate `agent-client-protocol-extras` to ACP 0.11 by porting the simplest wrapper (`TracingAgent`) first — this establishes the new builder/handler pattern that the remaining wrappers reuse.
+
+Files:
+- `agent-client-protocol-extras/src/lib.rs` — schema-type imports, exports.
+- `agent-client-protocol-extras/src/hook_config.rs` — hook config types (no Agent trait dependency, but uses schema types).
+- `agent-client-protocol-extras/src/tracing_agent.rs` — `TracingAgent<A>` wrapper.
+
+The `Agent` trait is gone in 0.11 — replaced by an `Agent` Role marker + `Agent.builder().on_receive_request(...).connect_to(...)` API. Reshape `TracingAgent` accordingly: it should still wrap an inner agent and emit tracing spans/events for every request and notification, but the wrapping mechanism is now the new builder/handler pattern, not `impl Agent for TracingAgent`.
+
+## Branch state at task start
+
+`acp/0.11-rewrite` already contains commit `d5b5465bd` (dep bump to `agent-client-protocol = "0.11.1"`). Continue from there.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `cargo check -p agent-client-protocol-extras --lib` passes for `lib.rs`, `hook_config.rs`, `tracing_agent.rs` (other files in the crate may still fail — they're handled by sibling tasks).
+- [ ] `TracingAgent` exports the same public surface (instrumentation behavior preserved) but in the new SDK shape.
+- [ ] One commit on `acp/0.11-rewrite` with a concise message describing the migration.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Any inline `#[test]` modules inside `tracing_agent.rs` pass under `cargo test -p agent-client-protocol-extras --lib tracing_agent` (or the equivalent nextest invocation). Tests that depend on `HookableAgent`, `RecordingAgent`, `PlaybackAgent` are out of scope here.
+
+## Workflow
+- Migration guide: https://agentclientprotocol.github.io/rust-sdk/migration_v0.11.x.html
+- Reference 0.11.1 source under `~/.cargo/registry/src/index.crates.io-*/agent-client-protocol-0.11.1/`.
+- Establish the wrapper pattern here that A2/A3/A4 will copy.
+
+## Depends on
+- 01KQ367HE0Z8ZSXY90CTT8QYGG (spike — done).
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value:
## What

Migrate `agent-client-protocol-extras` to ACP 0.11 by porting the simplest wrapper (`TracingAgent`) first — this establishes the new builder/handler pattern that the remaining wrappers reuse.

Files:
- `agent-client-protocol-extras/src/lib.rs` — schema-type imports, exports.
- `agent-client-protocol-extras/src/hook_config.rs` — hook config types (no Agent trait dependency, but uses schema types).
- `agent-client-protocol-extras/src/tracing_agent.rs` — `TracingAgent<A>` wrapper.

The `Agent` trait is gone in 0.11 — replaced by an `Agent` Role marker + `Agent.builder().on_receive_request(...).connect_to(...)` API. Reshape `TracingAgent` accordingly: it should still wrap an inner agent and emit tracing spans/events for every request and notification, but the wrapping mechanism is now the new builder/handler pattern, not `impl Agent for TracingAgent`.

## Branch state at task start

`acp/0.11-rewrite` already contains commit `d5b5465bd` (dep bump to `agent-client-protocol = "0.11.1"`). Continue from there.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `cargo check -p agent-client-protocol-extras --lib` passes for `lib.rs`, `hook_config.rs`, `tracing_agent.rs` (other files in the crate may still fail — they're handled by sibling tasks).
- [ ] `TracingAgent` exports the same public surface (instrumentation behavior preserved) but in the new SDK shape.
- [ ] One commit on `acp/0.11-rewrite` with a concise message describing the migration.

## Tests
- [ ] Any inline `#[test]` modules inside `tracing_agent.rs` pass under `cargo test -p agent-client-protocol-extras --lib tracing_agent` (or the equivalent nextest invocation). Tests that depend on `HookableAgent`, `RecordingAgent`, `PlaybackAgent` are out of scope here.

## Workflow
- Migration guide: https://agentclientprotocol.github.io/rust-sdk/migration_v0.11.x.html
- Reference 0.11.1 source under `~/.cargo/registry/src/index.crates.io-*/agent-client-protocol-0.11.1/`.
- Establish the wrapper pattern here that A2/A3/A4 will copy.

## Depends on
- 01KQ367HE0Z8ZSXY90CTT8QYGG (spike — done).
